```{r}
p5 <- ggplot(data=subset(m1bpredEvt2, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park" & SessionPart=="B")) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.8,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, AmbientEnv=='Park' &
                                       UASOperation=='Overflight' & SessionPart=='B'),
                         aes(x=UASEvents, y=dAnnoyMean,
                             colour=UASLAEMaxLR, shape=UASType),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
  
              scale_color_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=FALSE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                  breaks=c(73, 79)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE)) +
  
              ggnewscale::new_scale_color() +
  
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASEvents, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)),
                          alpha=0.05) +
  
              geom_line(aes(x=UASEvents, y=estimate, colour=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)), linewidth=1, alpha=0.5) +

              scale_color_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                   labels=function(x) format(round(as.numeric(x) +
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                                   0),
                                                             nsmall = 0)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                   labels=function(x) format(round(as.numeric(x) +
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                                   0),
                                                             nsmall = 0)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(10, 11, 12)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE)) +
            
              scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(1, 3, 5, 9), labels=c(1, 3, 5, 9)) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(2, 7)) +
              
              labs(x="Number of UAS Overflight events", y="Mean change in annoyance")

p5
```

#### model diagnostics

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}}


m1b.resP <- residuals(m1b, type="pearson", plot.it=FALSE,
                      pch=1, col=mycolours[3], identify=10)

gee_residplot(m1b, residual_vals=m1b.resP,
              colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.3) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4, text=element_text (family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Fitted values", y="Standardised Pearson residuals")

m1b.resM <- residuals(m1b, type="mahalanobis", plot.it=FALSE)

# plot Mahalanobis residuals with ggplot2 on a stem plot replacing the index by the corresponding participant ID
geeCluster_stemplot(m1b,
                    clusterVar=m1b.resM,
                    colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Mahalanobis distance")

m1b.Cook <- cooks.distance(m1b, plot.it=FALSE)

geeCluster_stemplot(m1b, clusterVar=m1b.Cook,
                    colour=mycolours[4], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Cook's distance")

hist(m1b.resP, breaks=20, main="Standardised Pearson residuals")

performance::check_collinearity(m1b)
performance::check_heteroskedasticity(m1b)
performance::check_outliers(m1b,
                            method=c('cook', 'pareto', 'zscore', 'zscore_robust',
                                     'ci', 'eti', 'hdi', 'bci', 'mahalanobis', 'lof'))

```

### with personal factors

```{r}

model1 <- mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(dAnnoyance ~ TrialNumberScl +
                                                                       UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv +
                                                                       UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(UASEvents^-1) +
                                                                  UASLAEMaxLRScl*UASOperation +
                                                                    UASType +
                                                                    NationGeo2 + AAM_attitude2,
                                                                data=subjDataNoAmb,
                                                                family=gaussian(link='identity'),
                                                                id=ID,
                                                                corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(model1, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

parameters::standardise_parameters(model1, method='refit', ci=0.843,
                                   robust=FALSE, two_sd=TRUE, include_response=FALSE)
parameters::standardise_parameters(model1, method='refit', ci=0.95,
                                   robust=FALSE, two_sd=TRUE, include_response=FALSE)

geeModelPerformance(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE, mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE)

predictMeans <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=cbind(insight::get_data(model1),
                                                               StimID=marginaleffects::get_modeldata(model1)$StimID),
                                                  by=c("StimID", "UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                       "UASEvents", "UASType",
                                                       "UASOperation", "AmbientEnv"),
                                                  vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

R2means <- 1 - sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - predictMeans$estimate)^2)/sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - mean(stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean))^2)
R2means

eRMSE <- epsilonRMSE(measured_data=stimDataNoAmb, predicted_data=predictMeans,
                    measured_target='dAnnoyMean', measured_ci_low='dAnnoyMeanCI_Low',
                    measured_ci_high='dAnnoyMeanCI_High', fitted='estimate')
eRMSE

predictMeans2 <- cbind(predictMeans, response=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean, responseCI_Low=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_Low,
                       responseCI_High=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_High)

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=predictMeans2) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate), size=2.5, shape=4, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.5) +

  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, xmin=responseCI_Low, xmax=responseCI_High,
                            y=estimate), width=0, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.1) +
  
  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high), width=0, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.1) +

  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance (test)", y="Predicted mean change in annoyance") +
  
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6.75, label=deparse(bquote(italic(R)^2 == .(round(R2means, 3)))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0, parse=TRUE) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6, label=paste0("RMSE = ", round(eRMSE$rmse, 3)), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.1, y = 5.25, label = paste0("RMSE[epsilon] == ", round(eRMSE$epsilon_rmse, 3)), 
  family = "serif", size = 4, hjust = 0, parse = TRUE)


# fit log events model for comparison
model1lgQ <- update(model1, . ~ . -I(UASEvents^-1) + I(log10(UASEvents)))


rngUASLAEMaxLRScl <- range(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl)

model1predictType <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                        variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "UASType", "AmbientEnv", "UASEvents"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictOp <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                      variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "UASOperation", "AmbientEnv", "UASEvents"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictEnv <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                      variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "AmbientEnv", "UASEvents"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictEvt <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                      variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),

                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "UASEvents", "UASOperation",
                                                           "AmbientEnv"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictEvt2 <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                      variables=(list(UASLAEMaxLRScl = c(6, 12), UASType=c("H520", "T150"))),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "UASEvents", "UASOperation",

model1predictEvt2_Q <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1lgQ, newdata=insight::get_data(model1lgQ),

                                                           "AmbientEnv"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(model1lgQ, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictNat <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                     variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                      min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),

                                                     by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "NationGeo2"),
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictAtt <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                     variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                      min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      length.out=25)),
                                                     by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "AAM_attitude2"),
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

p1 <- ggplot(data=subset(model1predictType, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, UASEvents==1), aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                                                 colour=UASType, shape=UASType),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=UASType), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=UASType), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='plasma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='plasma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(10, 11, 12)) +

              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance") +
              facet_grid(rows = vars(AmbientEnv))

p2 <- ggplot(data=subset(model1predictOp, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,

              facet_grid(rows = vars(AmbientEnv))

p3 <- ggplot(data=subset(model1predictEnv, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,

p1 <- p1 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p1 <- gginnards::delete_layers(p1, "GeomPoint")
p2 <- p2 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p2 <- gginnards::delete_layers(p2, "GeomPoint")
p3 <- p3 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p3 <- gginnards::delete_layers(p3, "GeomPoint")
p4 <- p4 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p4 <- gginnards::delete_layers(p4, "GeomPoint")

(p1 | p2) + (p3 / p4)

              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.8,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, AmbientEnv=='Park' &
                                       UASOperation=='Overflight' & SessionPart=='B'),
                         aes(x=UASEvents, y=dAnnoyMean,
                             colour=UASLAEMaxLR, shape=UASType),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
  
              scale_color_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=FALSE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                  breaks=c(73, 79)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE)) +
  
              ggnewscale::new_scale_color() +
  
              geom_ribbon(data=subset(model1predictEvt2, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park"),
                          aes(x=UASEvents, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)),
                          alpha=0.05) +
  
              geom_ribbon(data=subset(model1predictEvt2_Q, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park"),
                          aes(x=UASEvents, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, colour=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)),
                          linewidth=0.5, linetype=3, fill=NA, alpha=0.25) +
              
              geom_line(data=subset(model1predictEvt2, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park"),
                        aes(x=UASEvents, y=estimate, colour=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)), linewidth=1, alpha=0.5) +
  
              geom_line(data=subset(model1predictEvt2_Q, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park"),
                        aes(x=UASEvents, y=estimate, colour=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)), alpha=0.5,
                        linewidth=1, linetype=3) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                   labels=function(x) format(round(as.numeric(x) +
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                                   0),
                                                             nsmall = 0)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                   labels=function(x) format(round(as.numeric(x) +
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                                   0),
                                                             nsmall = 0)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(10, 11, 12)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS type"), reverse=FALSE) +
            
              scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(1, 3, 5, 9), labels=c(1, 3, 5, 9)) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1)) +
              
              labs(x="Number of UAS Overflight events", y="Mean change in annoyance")
```

### Model diagnostics

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}}


mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE.resP <- residuals(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE,
                                                     type="pearson", plot.it=FALSE,
                                                     pch=1, col=mycolours[3], identify=10)

gee_residplot(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE,
              residual_vals=mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE.resP,
              colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.3) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4, text=element_text (family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Fitted values", y="Standardised Pearson residuals")

mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE.resM <- residuals(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE,
                                                     type="mahalanobis", plot.it=FALSE)

# plot Mahalanobis residuals with ggplot2 on a stem plot replacing the index by the corresponding participant ID
geeCluster_stemplot(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE,
                    clusterVar=mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE.resM,
                    colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Mahalanobis distance")

mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE.Cook <- cooks.distance(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE,
                                                          plot.it=FALSE)

geeCluster_stemplot(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE,
                    clusterVar=mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE.Cook,
                    colour=mycolours[4], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Cook's distance")

hist(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE.resP, breaks=20, main="Standardised Pearson residuals")

mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE.DfBc <- dfbeta(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE,
                                                  level='clusters', coefs=c('UASLAEMaxLRScl'))
mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE.DfBo <- dfbeta(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE,
                                                  level='observations', coefs=c('UASLAEMaxLRScl'))


performance::check_collinearity(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE)
performance::check_heteroskedasticity(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE)
performance::check_outliers(mABTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE,
                            method=c('cook', 'pareto', 'zscore', 'zscore_robust',
                                     'ci', 'eti', 'hdi', 'bci', 'mahalanobis', 'lof'))

```

### Senstivity test excluding participant 28

```{R}

subjDataNoAmbNo28 <- subjDataNoAmb %>%
  dplyr::filter(ID != 28)

model1 <- mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAttNo28.GEE <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(dAnnoyance ~ UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(UASEvents^-1) +
                                                                  UASLAEMaxLRScl*UASType +
                                                                  UASLAEMaxLRScl*UASOperation +
                                                                  UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv +
                                                                  TrialNumberScl +
                                                                    NationGeo2 + AAM_attitude2,
                                                                data=subjDataNoAmbNo28,
                                                                family=gaussian(link='identity'),
                                                                id=ID,
                                                                corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(model1, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

parameters::standardise_parameters(model1, method='refit', ci=0.843,
                                   robust=FALSE, two_sd=TRUE, include_response=FALSE)
parameters::standardise_parameters(model1, method='refit', ci=0.95,
                                   robust=FALSE, two_sd=TRUE, include_response=FALSE)

geeModelPerformance(mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAtt.GEE, mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAttNo28.GEE)

mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAttNo28.GEE.resM <- residuals(mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAttNo28.GEE,
                                                     type="mahalanobis", plot.it=FALSE)

mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAttNo28.GEE.resP <- residuals(mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAttNo28.GEE,
                                                     type="pearson", plot.it=TRUE,
                                                     pch=1, col=mycolours[3], identify=10)

gee_residplot(mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAttNo28.GEE,
              residual_vals=mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAttNo28.GEE.resP,
              colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.3) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4, text=element_text (family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Fitted values", y="Standardised Pearson residuals")


# plot Mahalanobis residuals with ggplot2 on a stem plot replacing the index by the corresponding participant ID
geeCluster_stemplot(mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAttNo28.GEE,
                    clusterVar=mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAttNo28.GEE.resM,
                    colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Mahalanobis distance")

performance::check_collinearity(mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAttNo28.GEE)
performance::check_heteroskedasticity(mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAttNo28.GEE)
performance::check_outliers(mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESqNatAttNo28.GEE,
                            method=c('cook', 'pareto', 'zscore', 'zscore_robust',
                                     'ci', 'eti', 'hdi', 'bci', 'mahalanobis', 'lof'))
```

### Using ordered beta distribution in mixed effects model

```{R}
# add a rescaled dAnnoyance variable to subjDataNoAmb
subjDataNoAmb <- subjDataNoAmb |>
  dplyr::mutate(dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl = betaTransform(dAnnoyance, -10, 10,
                                               direction='forward', squeeze='none'))

subjDataNoAmb <- subjDataNoAmb |>
  dplyr::mutate(dAnnoyanceBetaScl = betaTransform(dAnnoyance, -10, 10,
                                               direction='forward', squeeze='basic'))

```


```{R}

modelNull <- glmmTMB::glmmTMB(dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ 1 + (1 | ID),
                        data=subjDataNoAmb, family=ordbeta(link="logit"))

modelMinX <- buildmer::buildglmmTMB(dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ 1+ SessionPart + TrialNumberScl +
                                     UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                                     UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASOperation +
                                     UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASType +
                                     UASOperation*UASType +
                                     NationGeo2 + AAM_attitude2 + Home_Area2 +
                                     Age + Sex + NSSTotal + Area_soundscape2 +
                                  (1 + UASLAEMaxLRScl + AmbientEnv + I(log10(UASEvents)) | ID),
                        data=subjDataNoAmb, family=ordbeta(link="logit"),
                       buildmerControl = buildMercontrol)

modelMin <- modelMinX@model


model1 <- glmmTMB::glmmTMB(dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ 1 + SessionPart + TrialNumberScl +
                                     UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                                     UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASOperation +
                                     UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASType +
                                     UASOperation*UASType +
                                     NationGeo2 + AAM_attitude2 + Home_Area2 +
                                     Age + Sex + NSSTotal + Area_soundscape2 +
                                  (1 + UASLAEMaxLRScl + AmbientEnv + I(log10(UASEvents)) | ID),
                        data=subjDataNoAmb, family=ordbeta(link="logit"),
                        control=glmmTMBcontrol)

model2 <- glmmTMB::glmmTMB(dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ NationGeo2 +  
                            AAM_attitude2 +  
                            UASType + TrialNumberScl +  
                            UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(UASEvents^-1) +
                              UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASOperation +
                                  (1 | ID),
                        data=subjDataNoAmb, family=ordbeta(link="logit"),
                        control=glmmTMBcontrol)

model3 <- glmmTMB::glmmTMB(dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ NationGeo2 +
                          UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv + AAM_attitude2 +
                            UASType + TrialNumberScl +
                          UASLAEMaxLRScl*UASOperation + UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(UASEvents^-1)+
                            AmbientEnv*UASOperation +
                                  (1 | ID),
                        data=subjDataNoAmb, family=ordbeta(link="logit"),
                        control=glmmTMBcontrol)

X <- model.matrix(dAnnoyanceBetaScl ~ TrialNumberScl +
                     UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv +
                     UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(UASEvents^-1) +
                UASLAEMaxLRScl*UASOperation +
                  UASType +
                  NationGeo2 + AAM_attitude2,
                data=subjDataNoAmb)
y <- subjDataNoAmb$dAnnoyance

# calculate beta regression with glmnet and cross-validation to select lambda, using alpha=0.5 for elastic net regularisation
# then make results a named, sorted dataframe of coefficients
modelBetaShrinkTest <- SelectBoost.beta::betareg_glmnet(X=X, Y=y, alpha = 0.5,
                                                        choose='cv', nfolds=10,
                                                        prestandardize = TRUE) |>
  abs() |>
  sort(decreasing = TRUE) |>
  tibble::enframe(name = "Variable", value = "CoefficientMagn")
  


set.seed(42)
n <- 100
x1 <- rnorm(n)
x2 <- rnorm(n)
# The true relationship only uses main effects
y <- 2*x1 + 3*x2 + rnorm(n, sd = 0.5)

# 2. Generate a model matrix with interaction terms (x1, x2, and x1:x2)
# The formula y ~ x1 * x2 includes main effects and the interaction
X <- model.matrix(y ~ x1 * x2 - 1) 

# 3. Fit Elastic Net using cross-validation
# alpha = 0.5 balances Lasso (selection) and Ridge (grouping)
# alpha = 1 would be pure Lasso, which is also effective for selection
fit_en <- cv.glmnet(X, y, alpha = 0.5)

# 4. Extract coefficients at the optimal lambda (lambda.min)
# Irrelevant terms like 'x1:x2' should be zeroed out
coef(fit_en, s = "lambda.min")

# 
# tic()
# test <- varStabilityClust(formula = dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ TrialNumberScl +
#                                      UASLAEMaxLRScl + AmbientEnv +
#                                      I(UASEvents^-1) +
#                                   UASType +
#                                   UASOperation +
#                                   NationGeo2 + AAM_attitude2 + Home_Area2,
#                           data=subjDataNoAmb, cluster_id=ID,
#                           family=ordbeta(link='logit'), resamples=10,
#                           cv_fold=5, use.parallel=TRUE)
# toc()

parameters::parameters(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=FALSE)
parameters::parameters(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=FALSE)

parameters::parameters(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=TRUE)
parameters::parameters(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=TRUE)

performance::compare_performance(modelNull, modelGLMMBTest)

predictMeans <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1,
                                                 newdata=cbind(insight::get_data(model1),
                                                               StimID=marginaleffects::get_modeldata(model1)$StimID),
                                                  by=c("StimID", "UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                       "UASEvents", "UASType",
                                                       "UASOperation", "AmbientEnv"),
                                                      vcov='HC0')
tic()
predictMeansBoot <- marginaleffects::inferences(predictMeans, method='boot', R=100, conf_type='perc')
toc()

predictMeansTform <- predictMeansBoot |> dplyr::mutate(estimate=betaTransform(estimate, -10, 10,
                                                                              direction='reverse', squeeze='none'),
                                           conf.low=betaTransform(conf.low, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'),
                                           conf.high=betaTransform(conf.high, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'))

R2means <- 1 - sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - predictMeansTform$estimate)^2)/sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - mean(stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean))^2)
R2means

eRMSE <- epsilonRMSE(measured_data=stimDataNoAmb, predicted_data=predictMeansTform,
                    measured_target='dAnnoyMean', measured_ci_low='dAnnoyMeanCI_Low',
                    measured_ci_high='dAnnoyMeanCI_High', fitted='estimate')
eRMSE

predictMeans2 <- cbind(predictMeansTform, response=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean, responseCI_Low=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_Low,
                       responseCI_High=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_High)

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=predictMeans2) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate), size=2.5, shape=4, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.5) +

  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, xmin=responseCI_Low, xmax=responseCI_High,
                            y=estimate), width=0, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.1) +
  
  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high), width=0, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.1) +

  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance (test)", y="Predicted mean change in annoyance") +
  
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6.75, label=deparse(bquote(italic(R)^2 == .(round(R2means, 3)))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0, parse=TRUE) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6, label=paste0("RMSE = ", round(eRMSE$rmse, 3)), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.1, y = 5.25, label = paste0("RMSE[epsilon] == ", round(eRMSE$epsilon_rmse, 3)), 
  family = "serif", size = 4, hjust = 0, parse = TRUE)


model1predictOp <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                      variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "UASOperation", "AmbientEnv", "UASEvents"),
                                                      vcov='HC0') |>
  dplyr::mutate(estimate=betaTransform(estimate, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'),
                conf.low=betaTransform(conf.low, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'),
                conf.high=betaTransform(conf.high, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'))

model1predictEnv <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                      variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "AmbientEnv", "UASEvents"),
                                                      vcov='HC0') |>
  dplyr::mutate(estimate=betaTransform(estimate, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'),
                conf.low=betaTransform(conf.low, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'),
                conf.high=betaTransform(conf.high, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'))

model1predictEvt <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                      variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "UASEvents", "UASOperation",
                                                           "AmbientEnv"),
                                                      vcov='HC0') |>
  dplyr::mutate(estimate=betaTransform(estimate, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'),
                conf.low=betaTransform(conf.low, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'),
                conf.high=betaTransform(conf.high, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'))

model1predictEvt2 <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                      variables=(list(UASLAEMaxLRScl = c(6, 12), UASType=c("H520", "T150"))),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "UASEvents", "UASOperation",
                                                           "AmbientEnv"),
                                                      vcov='HC0') |>
  dplyr::mutate(estimate=betaTransform(estimate, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'),
                conf.low=betaTransform(conf.low, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'),
                conf.high=betaTransform(conf.high, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'))

model1predictNat <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                     variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                      min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      length.out=25)),
                                                     by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "NationGeo2"),
                                                      vcov='HC0') |>
  dplyr::mutate(estimate=betaTransform(estimate, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'),
                conf.low=betaTransform(conf.low, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'),
                conf.high=betaTransform(conf.high, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'))

model1predictAtt <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(model1, newdata=insight::get_data(model1),
                                                     variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                      min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      length.out=25)),
                                                     by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "AAM_attitude2"),
                                                      vcov='HC0') |>
  dplyr::mutate(estimate=betaTransform(estimate, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'),
                conf.low=betaTransform(conf.low, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'),
                conf.high=betaTransform(conf.high, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none'))

p1 <- ggplot(data=subset(model1predictType, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, UASEvents==1), aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                                                 colour=UASType, shape=UASType),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=UASType), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=UASType), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='plasma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='plasma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(10, 11, 12)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance") +
              facet_grid(rows = vars(AmbientEnv))

p2 <- ggplot(data=subset(model1predictOp, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, UASEvents==1), aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                                                 colour=UASOperation, shape=UASOperation),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=UASOperation), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=UASOperation), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='mako', discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='mako', discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(9, 6, 2)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="UAS operation", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="UAS operation", reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS operation", reverse=TRUE)) +
              
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance") +
              facet_grid(rows = vars(AmbientEnv))

p3 <- ggplot(data=subset(model1predictEnv, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),

                    axis.title.x=element_blank(),

p4 <- ggplot(data=subset(model1predictEvt, AmbientEnv=='Park' & UASOperation=='Overflight')) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),

(p1 | p2) + (p3 / p4)

                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p1 <- gginnards::delete_layers(p1, "GeomPoint")
p2 <- p2 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p2 <- gginnards::delete_layers(p2, "GeomPoint")
p3 <- p3 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p3 <- gginnards::delete_layers(p3, "GeomPoint")
p4 <- p4 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, AmbientEnv=='Park' &

              scale_color_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=FALSE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                  breaks=c(73, 79)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE)) +
  
              ggnewscale::new_scale_color() +
  
              geom_ribbon(data=subset(model1predictEvt2, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park"),
                          aes(x=UASEvents, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)),
                          alpha=0.05) +
  
              geom_line(data=subset(model1predictEvt2, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park"),
                        aes(x=UASEvents, y=estimate, colour=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)), linewidth=1, alpha=0.5) +

              
              scale_color_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                   labels=function(x) format(round(as.numeric(x) +
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -

                                                                   0),
                                                             nsmall = 0)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                   labels=function(x) format(round(as.numeric(x) +
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                                   0),
                                                             nsmall = 0)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(10, 11, 12)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS type"), reverse=FALSE) +
            
              scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(1, 3, 5, 9), labels=c(1, 3, 5, 9)) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1)) +
              
              labs(x="Number of UAS Overflight events", y="Mean change in annoyance")

```

## UAS info only

### LAE, events and trial sequence only

```{r}

model1 <- mABLAEx1_QSq.GEE <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(dAnnoyance ~ UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(UASEvents^-1) +
                                                      TrialNumberScl,
                                                      data=subjDataNoAmb,
                                                      family=gaussian(link='identity'),
                                                      id=ID,
                                                      corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(model1, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

parameters::standardise_parameters(model1, method='refit', ci=0.843,
                                   robust=FALSE, two_sd=TRUE, include_response=FALSE)
parameters::standardise_parameters(model1, method='refit', ci=0.95,
                                   robust=FALSE, two_sd=TRUE, include_response=FALSE)

geeModelPerformance(mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE, mABLAEx1_QSq.GEE)

predictMeans <- predictNew(model=model1, newData=stimDataNoAmb,
                           response=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean,
                           fixVars=c(TrialNumberScl=mean(subjDataNoAmb$TrialNumberScl)))

R2means <- cor(predictMeans$response, predictMeans$fit)^2
R2means

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=predictMeans) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=12),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=fit), size=2.5, shape=1, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.5) +
  
  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-0.5, 9)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-0.5, 9)) +
  
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance (test)", y="Predicted mean change in annoyance")


model1predictEvt <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [-12:13]",
                                                                "UASEvents [all]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))


p1 <- ggplot(data=model1predictEvt) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=stimDataNoAmb, aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                                                 colour=factor(UASEvents),
                                                 shape=factor(UASEvents)),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=x, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=group), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=x, y=predicted, colour=group), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(4, 5, 7, 8)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +

              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

p1

# save the model
if (savedata) {
  filename = "1A_dA_LAE_noEnv"
  saveRDS(model1, file=file.path(outDataPath, paste(filename, ".rds", sep="")))
  
}

```

### fit and examine final model

```{r}

model1 <- mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(dAnnoyance ~ UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(UASEvents^-1) +
                                                     UASImpulsSHMAvgMaxLR +
                                                     UASSharpAurISO305ExMaxLR*UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin +
                                                     TrialNumberScl,
                                                    data=subjDataNoAmb,
                                                    family=gaussian(link='identity'),
                                                    id=ID,
                                                    corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(model1, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

parameters::standardise_parameters(model1, method='refit', ci=0.843,
                                   robust=FALSE, two_sd=TRUE, include_response=FALSE)
parameters::standardise_parameters(model1, method='refit', ci=0.95,
                                   robust=FALSE, two_sd=TRUE, include_response=FALSE)

geeModelPerformance(mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE, mABLAEx1_QSq.GEE,
                    mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE)

predictMeans <- predictNew(model=model1, newData=stimDataNoAmb,
                           response=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean,
                           fixVars=c(TrialNumberScl=mean(subjDataNoAmb$TrialNumberScl)))

R2means <- cor(predictMeans$response, predictMeans$fit)^2
R2means

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=predictMeans) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=fit), size=2.5, shape=1, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.5) +
  
  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance (test)", y="Predicted mean change in annoyance")

model1predictEvt <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [-12:13]",
                                                                "UASEvents [all]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictLxS <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [-12:13]",
                                                               "UASSharpAurISO305ExMaxLR [1.2:2.8, by=0.4]",
                                                                 "UASEvents [1]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictLxTn <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [-12:13]",
                                                                 "UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin [0.5:1.5, by=0.25]",
                                                                 "UASEvents [1]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictSxTn <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASSharpAurISO305ExMaxLR [all]",
                                                                 "UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin [0.5:1.5, by=0.25]",
                                                                 "UASEvents [1]",
                                                                 "UASLAEMaxLRScl [8]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))


p1 <- ggplot(data=model1predictEvt) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=stimDataNoAmb, aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean, colour=factor(UASEvents), shape=factor(UASEvents)),
                         alpha=0.55, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=x, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=group), alpha=0.05) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=x, y=predicted, colour=group), alpha=0.5, linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(4, 5, 7, 8)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +

              
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

p2 <- ggplot(data=model1predictLxS) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +

              geom_ribbon(aes(x=x, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=group), alpha=0.05) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=x, y=predicted, colour=group), alpha=0.5, linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='mako', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='mako', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(S)["5"]~","~acum[A~"|"~`M-G-S`])), reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(S)["5"]~","~acum[A~"|"~`M-G-S`])), reverse=TRUE)) +
  
              ggnewscale::new_scale_color() +
            
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(4, 5, 7, 8)) +
              scale_color_viridis(option='mako', direction=-1, discrete=FALSE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8,
                                  breaks=seq(1.2, 2.8, by=0.4)) +

              guides(colour=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(S)["5"]~","~acum[A~"|"~`M-G-S`])), reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +  

              
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              geom_point(data=stimDataNoAmb, aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean, colour=UASSharpAurISO305ExMaxLR, shape=factor(UASEvents)),
                         alpha=0.55, size=2) +
  
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")


p3 <- ggplot(data=model1predictLxTn) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +

              geom_ribbon(aes(x=x, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=group), alpha=0.05) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=x, y=predicted, colour=group), alpha=0.5, linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='mako', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='mako', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(T)[italic(N)]^"*"~","~sone[SHM])), reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(T)[italic(N)]^"*"~","~sone[SHM])), reverse=TRUE)) +
              
              ggnewscale::new_scale_color() +
  
              geom_point(data=stimDataNoAmb, aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean, colour=UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin, shape=factor(UASEvents)),
                         alpha=0.55, size=2) +
  
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(4, 5, 7, 8)) +
              scale_color_viridis(option='mako', direction=-1, discrete=FALSE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8,
                                  breaks=seq(0.5, 1.5, by=0.25)) +
  
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(T)[italic(N)]^"*"~","~sone[SHM])), reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +
              
              
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

p4 <- ggplot(data=model1predictSxTn) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +

                     fill=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(T)[italic(N)]^"*"~","~sone[SHM])), reverse=TRUE)) +

                         alpha=0.55, size=2) +

              scale_color_viridis(option='mako', direction=-1, discrete=FALSE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8,

```

### Model diagnostics

```{r}

mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE.resD <- residuals(mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE,
                                                     type="deviance", plot.it=TRUE,
                                                     pch=1, col=mycolours[1],identify=10)
mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE.resM <- residuals(mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE,
                                                     type="mahalanobis", plot.it=TRUE,
                                                     col=mycolours[2], identify=10)
mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE.resP <- residuals(mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE,
                                                     type="pearson", plot.it=TRUE,
                                                     pch=1, col=mycolours[3], identify=10)

hist(mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE.resD, breaks=20, main="Deviance residuals")
hist(mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE.resP, breaks=20, main="Pearson residuals")

mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE.DfBc <- dfbeta(mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE,
                                                  level='clusters', coefs=c('UASLAEMaxLRScl'))
mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE.DfBo <- dfbeta(mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE,
                                                  level='observations', coefs=c('UASLAEMaxLRScl'))

mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE.Cook <- cooks.distance(mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE,
                                                          plot.it=TRUE)

performance::check_collinearity(mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE)
performance::check_heteroskedasticity(mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE)

```

### omit impulsiveness

```{r}

model1 <- mABSxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(dAnnoyance ~ UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(UASEvents^-1) +
                                                     UASSharpAurISO305ExMaxLR*UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin +
                                                     TrialNumberScl,
                                                    data=subjDataNoAmb,
                                                    family=gaussian(link='identity'),
                                                    id=ID,
                                                    corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(model1, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

parameters::standardise_parameters(model1, method='refit', ci=0.843,
                                   robust=FALSE, two_sd=TRUE, include_response=FALSE)
parameters::standardise_parameters(model1, method='refit', ci=0.95,
                                   robust=FALSE, two_sd=TRUE, include_response=FALSE)

geeModelPerformance(mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE, mABLAEx1_QSq.GEE,
                    mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE, mABSxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE)

predictMeans <- predictNew(model=model1, newData=stimDataNoAmb,
                           response=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean,
                           fixVars=c(TrialNumberScl=mean(subjDataNoAmb$TrialNumberScl)))

R2means <- cor(predictMeans$response, predictMeans$fit)^2
R2means

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=predictMeans) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=fit), size=2.5, shape=1, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.5) +
  
  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance (test)", y="Predicted mean change in annoyance")

                                                                 "UASEvents [1]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed',

                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
```

## with env class

### LAE, events, env and trial sequence only

```{r}

model1 <- mABEnvLAEx1_QSq.GEE <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(dAnnoyance ~ UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(UASEvents^-1) +
                                                      UASLAEMaxLRScl + AmbientEnv +
                                                      TrialNumberScl,
                                                      data=subjDataNoAmb,
                                                      family=gaussian(link='identity'),
                                                      id=ID,
                                                      corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(model1, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

parameters::standardise_parameters(model1, method='refit', ci=0.843,
                                   robust=FALSE, two_sd=TRUE, include_response=FALSE)
parameters::standardise_parameters(model1, method='refit', ci=0.95,
                                   robust=FALSE, two_sd=TRUE, include_response=FALSE)

geeModelPerformance(mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE, mABEnvLAEx1_QSq.GEE)

predictMeans <- predictNew(model=model1, newData=stimDataNoAmb,
                           response=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean,
                           fixVars=c(TrialNumberScl=mean(subjDataNoAmb$TrialNumberScl)))

R2means <- cor(predictMeans$response, predictMeans$fit)^2
R2means

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=predictMeans) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=12),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=fit), size=2.5, shape=1, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.5) +
  
  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-0.5, 9)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-0.5, 9)) +
  
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance (test)", y="Predicted mean change in annoyance")


model1predictEvt <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [-12:13]",
                                                                "UASEvents [all]",
                                                                "AmbientEnv [Park]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))


model1predictEnv <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [-12:13]",
                                                                "AmbientEnv [all]",
                                                                "UASEvents [1]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

p1 <- ggplot(data=model1predictEvt) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=stimDataNoAmb[stimDataNoAmb$AmbientEnv == 'Park',],
                         aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                         colour=factor(UASEvents),
                         shape=factor(UASEvents)),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=x, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=group), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=x, y=predicted, colour=group), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(4, 5, 7, 8)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +

              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

p2 <- ggplot(data=model1predictEnv) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
                    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
                    axis.text.x=element_blank(),
                    axis.ticks.x=element_blank()) +
              
              geom_point(data=stimDataNoAmb, aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                                                 colour=AmbientEnv, shape=AmbientEnv),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=x, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=group), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=x, y=predicted, colour=group), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='magma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.7) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='magma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.7) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(1, 3)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="Amb. env.", reverse=FALSE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="Amb. env.", reverse=FALSE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="Amb. env.", reverse=FALSE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(y="Mean change in annoyance")

p1 + p2

```

### fit and examine final model

```{r}

model1 <- mABISxTnxEnvLAE1_QSq.GEE <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(dAnnoyance ~ UASLAEMaxLRScl + I(UASEvents^-1) +
                                                          UASImpulsSHMAvgMaxLR +
                                                          UASSharpAurISO305ExMaxLR*UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin +
                                                          AmbientEnv*UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin +
                                                          TrialNumberScl,
                                                          data=subjDataNoAmb,
                                                          family=gaussian(link='identity'),
                                                          id=ID,
                                                          corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(model1, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

parameters::standardise_parameters(model1, method='refit', ci=0.843,
                                   robust=FALSE, two_sd=TRUE, include_response=FALSE)
parameters::standardise_parameters(model1, method='refit', ci=0.95,
                                   robust=FALSE, two_sd=TRUE, include_response=FALSE)

geeModelPerformance(mABLAExTypeOpxLAExEnv1_QxLAESq.GEE, mABISxTnLAEx1_QSq.GEE,
                    mABISxTnxEnvLAE1_QSq.GEE)

predictMeans <- predictNew(model=model1, newData=stimDataNoAmb,
                           response=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean,
                           fixVars=c(TrialNumberScl=mean(subjDataNoAmb$TrialNumberScl)))

R2means <- cor(predictMeans$response, predictMeans$fit)^2
R2means

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=predictMeans) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=12),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=fit), size=2.5, shape=1, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.5) +
  
  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-0.5, 9)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-0.5, 9)) +
  
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance (test)", y="Predicted mean change in annoyance")


model1predictEvt <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [-12:13]",
                                                                "UASEvents [all]",
                                                                "AmbientEnv [Park]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictEnv <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin [all]",
                                                                "AmbientEnv [all]",
                                                                "UASEvents [1]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictEnvS <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASSharpAurISO305ExMaxLR [all]",
                                                                 "AmbientEnv [all]",
                                                                 "UASEvents [1]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictEnvSxTn <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASSharpAurISO305ExMaxLR [all]",
                                                                   "UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin [0.5:1.5, by=0.25]",
                                                                   "UASLAEMaxLRScl [-11, -5, 1, 6, 7, 12]",
                                                                   "AmbientEnv [all]",
                                                                   "UASEvents [1]"),
                                               margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                              vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictPkASxTn <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASSharpAurISO305ExMaxLR [all]",
                                                                   "UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin [0.5:1.5, by=0.25]",
                                                                   "UASLAEMaxLRScl [-11, -5, 1, 7]",
                                                                   "AmbientEnv [Park]",

model1predictIxL <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASImpulsSHMAvgMaxLR [all]",

                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed',

model1predictIxS <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASImpulsSHMAvgMaxLR [all]",
                                                                "UASSharpAurISO305ExMaxLR [1.3:2.8, by=0.5]",
                                                                "AmbientEnv [all]",
                                                                 "UASEvents [1]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))


model1predictIxTn <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASImpulsSHMAvgMaxLR [all]",
                                                                "UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin [0.5:1.5, by=0.25]",
                                                                "AmbientEnv [all]",

                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictEnvSxTn$UASLAEMaxLRSclRnd <- model1predictEnvSxTn$facet
model1predictEnvSxTn$AmbientEnv <- model1predictEnvSxTn$panel

model1predictPkASxTn$UASLAEMaxLRSclRnd <- model1predictPkASxTn$facet

model1predictIxL$AmbientEnv <- model1predictIxL$facet
model1predictIxS$AmbientEnv <- model1predictIxS$facet
model1predictIxTn$AmbientEnv <- model1predictIxTn$facet

stimDataNoAmbTemp <- stimDataNoAmb
numbersIn <- stimDataNoAmbTemp$UASLAEMaxLRScl
numberList <- c(-11, -5, 1, 6, 7, 12)
stimDataNoAmbTemp$UASLAEMaxLRSclRnd <- factor(numberSnap(numbersIn, numberList, rangeVal=0.9))
facetLabels <- c('-11'="56", '-5'="62", '1'="68", '6'="73", '7'="74", '12'="79")

p1 <- ggplot(data=model1predictEvt) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=stimDataNoAmb[stimDataNoAmb$AmbientEnv=='Park',], aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean, colour=factor(UASEvents), shape=factor(UASEvents)),
                         alpha=0.55, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=x, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=group), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=x, y=predicted, colour=group), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(4, 5, 7, 8)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +
            
              
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

p2 <- ggplot(data=model1predictEnv) +

                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +

                         alpha=0.55, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=x, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=group), alpha=0.1) +

              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(T)[italic(N)]^"*",",",~sone[SHM])), y="Mean change in annoyance")
```
